title: Licensed Practical Nurse
description: AstraZeneca, a global biopharmaceutical company, seeks a Licensed Practical Nurse to support clinical operations and employee health services. Working onsite in Houston, you'll provide patient care, administer medications, and support clinical team operations. Join a mission-driven organization advancing healthcare innovation.
responsibilities: Provide direct patient care and monitoring under RN supervision
Administer medications and treatments per established protocols
Maintain accurate patient records and clinical documentation
Assist with clinical procedures and patient preparation
Communicate with patients and families about care plans
Monitor vital signs and report changes to nursing staff

requirements.education: Practical Nursing diploma or Associate degree in nursing
skills: Patient care and clinical nursing skills
Ability to follow clinical protocols accurately

benefits: Health, dental, vision, and life insurance
Shift flexibility and paid time off
